cards.name: Mission Accomplished
abilities: Draw a Card.
[hc:tech]: Rescue a Bystander.

cards.name: Dangerous Rescue
abilities: [hc:covert]: You may KO a card from your hand or discard pile. If you do, rescue a Bystander.

cards.name: Covert Operation
abilities: You get +1[icon:attack] for each Bystander in your Victory Pile.

cards.name: Silent Sniper
abilities: Defeat a Villain or Mastermind that has a Bystander.

cards.name: Avengers Assemble!
abilities: You get +1[icon:recruit] for each color of Hero you have.

cards.name: Perfect Teamwork
abilities: You get +1[icon:attack] for each color of Hero you have.

cards.name: Diving Block
abilities: If you would gain a Wound, you may reveal this card and draw a card instead.

cards.name: A Day Unlike Any Other
abilities: [team:avengers]: You get +3[icon:attack] for each other [team:avengers] you played this turn.

cards.name: Determination
abilities: To play this card, you must discard a card from your hand.

cards.name: Optic Blast
abilities: To play this card, you must discard a card from your hand.

cards.name: Unending Energy
abilities: If a card effect makes you discard this card, you may return this card to your hand.

cards.name: X-Men United
abilities: [team:x-men]: You get +2[icon:attack] for each other [team:x-men] Hero you played this turn.

cards.name: Here, Hold This for a Second
cards.displayName: Here, Hold This for a Second
abilities: A Villain of your choice captures a Bystander.

cards.name: Hey, Can I Get a Do-Over?
cards.displayName: Hey, Can I Get a Do-Over?
abilities: If this is the first Hero you played this turn, you may discard the rest of your hand and draw four cards.

cards.name: Oddball
abilities: You get +1[icon:attack] for each other Hero with an odd-numbered [icon:vp] you played this turn.

cards.name: Random Acts of Unkindness
abilities: You may gain a Wound to your hand. Then each player passes a card from their hand to the player on their left.

cards.name: Mental Discipline
abilities: Draw a card.

cards.name: Shadowed Thoughts
abilities: [hc:covert]: You may play the top card of the Villain Deck. If you do, you get +2[icon:attack].

cards.name: Psychic Link
abilities: Each player may reveal another [team:x-men] Hero. Each player who does draws a card.

cards.name: Diamond Form
abilities: Whenever you defeat a Villain or Mastermind this turn, you get +3[icon:recruit].

cards.name: Stack the Deck
abilities: Draw two cards. Then put a card from your hand on top of your deck.

cards.name: Hypnotic Charm
abilities: Reveal the top card of your deck. Discard it or put it back.
[hc:instinct]: Do the same thing to each other player's deck.

cards.name: Card Shark
abilities: Reveal the top card of your deck. If it's an [team:x-men] Hero, draw it.

cards.name: High Stakes Jackpot
abilities: Reveal the top card of your deck. You get +[icon:attack] equal to that card's cost.

cards.name: Quick Draw
abilities: Draw a card.

cards.name: Team Player
abilities: [team:avengers]: You get +1[icon:attack].

cards.name: Covering Fire
abilities: [hc:tech]: Choose one: each other player draws a card or each other player discards a card.

cards.name: Impossible Trick Shot
abilities: Whenever you defeat a Villain or Mastermind this turn, rescue three Bystanders.

cards.name: Growing Anger
abilities: [hc:strength]: You get +1[icon:attack].

cards.name: Unstoppable Hulk
abilities: You may KO a Wound from your hand or discard pile. If you do, you get +2[icon:attack].

cards.name: Crazed Rampage
abilities: Each player gains a Wound.

cards.name: Hulk Smash!
abilities: [hc:strength]: You get +5[icon:attack].

cards.name: Endless Invention
abilities: Draw a card.
[hc:tech]: Draw another card.

cards.name: Repulsor Rays
abilities: [hc:ranged]: You get +1[icon:attack].

cards.name: Arc Reactor
abilities: [hc:tech]: You get +1[icon:attack] for each other[hc:tech] Hero you played this turn.

cards.name: Quantum Breakthrough
abilities: Draw two cards.
[hc:tech]: Draw two more cards.

cards.name: High-Tech Weaponry
abilities: [hc:tech]: You get +1[icon:attack].

cards.name: Battlefield Promotion
abilities: You may KO a [team:shield] Hero from your hand or discard pile. If you do, you may gain a S.H.I.E.L.D. Officer to your hand.

cards.name: Legendary Commander
abilities: You get +1[icon:attack] for each other[team:shield] Hero you played this turn.

cards.name: Pure Fury
abilities: Defeat any Villain or Mastermind whose [icon:attack] is less than the number of [team:shield] Heroes in the KO pile.

cards.name: Energy Drain
abilities: [hc:covert]: You may KO a card from your hand or discard pile. If you do, you get +1[icon:recruit].

cards.name: Borrowed Brawn
abilities: [hc:strength]: You get +3[icon:attack].

cards.name: Copy Powers
abilities: Play this card as a copy of another Hero you played this turn. This card is both [hc:covert] and the color you copy.

cards.name: Steal Abilities
abilities: Each player discards the top card of their deck. Play a copy of each of those cards.

cards.name: Astonishing Strength
abilities: Reveal the top card of your deck. If that card costs 2[icon:vp] or less, draw it.

cards.name: Great Responsibility
abilities: Reveal the top card of your deck. If that card costs 2[icon:vp] or less, draw it.

cards.name: Web-Shooters
abilities: Rescue a Bystander.
Reveal the top card of your deck. If that card costs 2[icon:vp] or less, draw it.

cards.name: The Amazing Spider-Man
abilities: Reveal the top three cards of your deck. Put any that cost 2[icon:vp] or less into your hand. Put the rest back in any order.

cards.name: Gathering Stormclouds
abilities: [hc:ranged]:  Draw a card.

cards.name: Lightning Bolt
abilities: Any Villain you fight on the Rooftops this turn gets -2[icon:attack].

cards.name: Spinning Cyclone
abilities: You may move a Villain to a new city space. Rescue any Bystanders captured by that Villain.
(If you move a Villain to a city space that already has Villain, swap them.)

cards.name: Tidal Wave
abilities: Any Villain you fight on the Bridge this turn gets -2[icon:attack].
[hc:ranged]: The Mastermind gets -2[icon:attack] this turn.

cards.name: Odinson
abilities: [hc:strength]: You get +2[icon:recruit].

cards.name: Surge of Power
abilities: If you made 8 or more [icon:recruit] this turn, you get +3[icon:attack].

cards.name: Call Lightning
abilities: [hc:ranged]: You get +3[icon:attack].

cards.name: God of Thunder
abilities: You can use [icon:recruit] as [icon:attack] this turn.

cards.name: Keen Senses
abilities: [hc:instinct]: Draw a card.

cards.name: Healing Factor
abilities: You may KO a Wound from your hand or discard pile. If you do, draw a card.

cards.name: Frenzied Slashing
abilities: [hc:instinct]: Draw two cards.

cards.name: Berserker Rage
abilities: Draw three cards.
[hc:instinct]: You get +1[icon:attack] for each extra card you've drawn this turn.

cards.name: Dr. Doom
abilities: Always Leads: Doombot Legion
Master Strike: Each player with exactly 6 cards in hand reveals a [hc:tech] Hero or puts 2 cards from their hand on top of their deck.

cards.name: Dark Technology
abilities: Fight: You may recruit a [hc:tech] or [hc:ranged] Hero from the HQ for free.

cards.name: Monarch's Decree
abilities: Fight: Choose one: each other player draws a card or each other player discards a card.

cards.name: Secrets of Time Travel
abilities: Fight: Take another turn after this one.

cards.name: Treasures of Latveria
abilities: Fight: When you draw a new hand of cards at the end of this turn, draw three extra cards.

cards.name: Loki
abilities: Always Leads: Enemies of Asgard
Master Strike: Each player reveals a [hc:strength] Hero or gains a Wound.

cards.name: Cruel Ruler
abilities: Fight: Defeat a Villain in the City for free.

cards.name: Maniacal Tyrant
abilities: Fight: KO up to four cards from your discard pile.

cards.name: Vanishing Illusions
abilities: Fight: Each other player KOs a Villain from their Victory Pile.

cards.name: Whispers and Lies
abilities: Fight: Each other player KOs two Bystanders from their Victory Pile.

cards.name: Magneto
abilities: Always Leads: Brotherhood
Master Strike: Each player reveals an [team:x-men] Hero or discards down to four cards.

cards.name: Bitter Captor
abilities: Fight: Recruit an [team:x-men] Hero from the HQ for free.

cards.name: Crushing Shockwave
abilities: Fight: Each other player reveals an [team:x-men] Hero or gains two Wounds.

cards.name: Electromagnetic Bubble
abilities: Fight: Choose one of your [team:x-men] Heroes. When you draw a new hand of cards at the end of this turn, add that Hero to your hand as a seventh card.

cards.name: Xavier's Nemesis
abilities: Fight: For each of your [team:x-men] Heroes, rescue a Bystander.

cards.name: Red Skull
abilities: Always Leads: HYDRA
Master Strike: Each player KOs a Hero from their hand.

cards.name: Endless Resources
abilities: Fight: You get +4[icon:recruit].

cards.name: HYDRA Conspiracy
abilities: Fight: Draw two cards. Then draw another card for each HYDRA Villain in your Victory Pile.

cards.name: Negablast Grenades
abilities: Fight: You get +3[icon:attack].

cards.name: Ruthless Dictator
abilities: Fight: Look at the top three cards of your deck. KO one, discard one and put one back on top of your deck.

cards.name: Blob
abilities: You can't defeat Blob unless you have an [team:x-men] Hero.

cards.name: Juggernaut
abilities: Ambush: Each player KOs two Heroes from their discard pile.
Escape: Each player KOs two Heroes from their hand.

cards.name: Mystique
abilities: Escape: Mystique becomes a Scheme Twist that takes effect immediately.

cards.name: Sabretooth
abilities: Fight: Each player reveals an [team:x-men] Hero or gains a Wound.
Escape: Same effect.

cards.name: Destroyer
abilities: Fight: KO all your [team:shield] Heroes.
Escape: Each player KOs two of their Heroes.

cards.name: Enchantress
abilities: Fight: Draw three cards.

cards.name: Frost Giant
abilities: Fight: Each player reveals a [hc:ranged] Hero or gains a Wound.
Escape: Same effect.

cards.name: Ymir, Frost Giant King
abilities: Ambush: Each player reveals a [hc:ranged] Hero or gains a Wound.
Fight: Choose a player. That player KOs any number of Wounds from their hand and discard pile.

cards.name: Endless Armies of HYDRA
abilities: Fight: Play the top two cards of the Villain Deck.

cards.name: HYDRA Kidnappers
abilities: Fight: You may gain a S.H.I.E.L.D. Officer.

cards.name: Supreme HYDRA
abilities: Supreme HYDRA is worth +3[icon:piercing] for each other HYDRA Villain in your Victory Pile.

cards.name: Viper
abilities: Fight: Each player without another HYDRA Villain in their Victory Pile gains a Wound.
Escape: Same effect.

cards.name: Baron Zemo
abilities: Fight: For each of your [team:avengers] Heroes, rescue a Bystander.

cards.name: Melter
abilities: Fight: Each player reveals the top card of their deck. For each card, you choose to KO it or put it back.

cards.name: Ultron
abilities: Ultron is worth +1[icon:piercing] for each [hc:tech] Hero you have among all your cards at the end of the game.
Escape: Each player reveals a [hc:tech] Hero or gains a Wound.

cards.name: Whirlwind
abilities: Fight: If you fight Whirlwind on the Rooftops or Bridge, KO two of your Heroes.

cards.name: Abomination
abilities: Fight: If you fight Abomination on the Streets or Bridge, rescue three Bystanders.

cards.name: The Leader
abilities: Ambush: Play the top card of the Villain Deck.

cards.name: Maestro
abilities: Fight: For each of your [hc:strength] Heroes, KO one of your Heroes.

cards.name: Zzzax
abilities: Fight: Each player reveals a [hc:strength] Hero or gains a Wound.
Escape: Same effect.

cards.name: Paibok the Power Skrull
abilities: Fight: Choose a Hero in the HQ for each player. Each player gains that Hero.

cards.name: Skrull Queen Veranke
abilities: Ambush: Put the highest-cost Hero from the HQ under this Villain. This Villain's [icon:attack] is equal to that Hero's [icon:vp].
Fight: Gain that Hero.

cards.name: Skrull Shapeshifters
abilities: Ambush: Put the rightmost Hero from the HQ under this Villain. This Villain's [icon:attack] is equal to that Hero's [icon:vp].
Fight: Gain that Hero

cards.name: Super-Skrull
abilities: Fight: Each player KOs one of their Heroes.

cards.name: Doctor Octopus
abilities: Fight: When you draw a new hand of cards at the end of this turn, draw eight cards instead of six.

cards.name: Green Goblin
abilities: Ambush: Green Goblin captures a Bystander.

cards.name: The Lizard
abilities: Fight: If you fight the Lizard in the Sewers, each other player gains a Wound.

cards.name: Venom
abilities: You can't defeat Venom unless you have a [hc:covert] Hero.
Escape: Each player gains a Wound.

henchmen.name: Doombot Legion
abilities: Fight: Look at the top two cards of your deck. KO one of them and put the other back.

henchmen.name: Hand Ninjas
abilities: Fight: You get +1[icon:recruit].

henchmen.name: Savage Land Mutates
abilities: Fight: When you draw a new hand of cards at the end of this turn, draw an extra card.

henchmen.name: Sentinel
abilities: Fight: KO one of your Heroes.
Setup: 8 Twists. 12 total Bystanders in the Villain Deck.
Special Rules: Each Villain gets +1[icon:attack] for each Bystander it has.
Twist: Any Villain in the Bank captures 2 Bystanders. Then play the top card of the Villain Deck.
Evil Wins: When 8 Bystanders are carried away by escaping Villains.

schemes.name: Secret Invasion of the Skrull Shapeshifters

abilities: Setup: 8 Twists. 6 Heroes. Skrull Villain Group required. Shuffle 12 random Heroes from the Hero Deck into the Villain Deck.
Special Rules: Heroes in the Villain Deck count as Skrull Villains with [icon:attack] equal to the Hero's [icon:vp]+2. If you defeat that Hero, you gain it.
Twist: The highest-cost Hero from the HQ moves into the Sewers as a Skrull Villain, as above.
Evil Wins: If 6 Heroes get into the Escaped Villains pile.
Setup: 8 Twists. Wound stack holds 6 Wounds per player.
Twist: Each player reveals a [hc:tech] Hero or gains a Wound.
Evil Wins: If the Wound stack runs out.
Setup: 8 Twists. Add an extra Henchman group to the Villain Deck.
Twist: Play the top 2 cards of the Villain Deck.
Evil Wins: If 12 Villains escape.
Setup: 7 Twists. Each Twist is a Dark Portal.
Twist 1: Put the Dark Portal above the Mastermind. The Mastermind gets +1[icon:attack].
Twists 2-6: Put the Dark Portal in the leftmost city space that doesn't yet have a Dark Portal. Villains in that city space get +1[icon:attack].
Twist 7: Evil Wins!
Setup: 5 Twists. 3 additional Twists next to this Scheme. 18 total Bystanders in the Villain Deck.
Special Rules: Bystanders in the Villain Deck count as Killbot Villains, with [icon:attack] equal to the number of Twists next to this Scheme.
Twist: Put the Twist next to this Scheme.
Evil Wins: If 5 “Killbots“ escape.
Setup: For 2-3 players, use 8 Twists. For 4-5 players, use 5 Twists. If only 2 players, use only 4 Heroes in the Hero Deck.
Twist: KO all the Heroes in the HQ.
Evil Wins: If the Hero Deck runs out.

schemes.name: Unleash the Power of the Cosmic Cube

abilities: Setup: 8 Twists.
Twist: Put the Twist next to this Scheme.
Twist 5-6: Each player gains a Wound.
Twist 7: Each player gains 3 Wounds.
Twist 8: Evil Wins!
